user: Would it be feasible for you to reply with voice notes?

Yes, feasible. Telegram bots can send voice messages, and we'd pipe replies through a TTS service (ElevenLabs or OpenAI TTS) before sending. Trade-offs: adds latency on top of Opus, costs per character, and charts/numbers don't carry well in audio — so likely best as an optional mode or for short replies only.
